ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class associated with the object */,
  "p_type" INTEGER /* Type of the object */,
  "p_code_type" INTEGER /* Code type of the object */,
  "p_dynamic_memory" INTEGER /* Dynamic memory usage of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the object belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the object */,
  "obj_description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "cls_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "cls_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "cls_type" INTEGER /* Type of the class */,
  "cls_code_type" INTEGER /* Code type of the class */,
  "cls_dynamic_memory" INTEGER /* Dynamic memory usage of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the class was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the class belongs to */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "role_hierarchy" TEXT /* Role hierarchy of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_class_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object in the relationship */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., inheritance, composition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_class_relationships_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_class_relationships_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_attributes_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the permission is for */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the instance belongs to */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "instance_description" TEXT /* Description of the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_instances_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the instance belongs to */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "instance_description" TEXT /* Description of the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_instances_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the object */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the class */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_versions_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_access_logs_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the class */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the class was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_access_logs_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_inheritance" (
  "inheritance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance relationship */,
  "child_obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child object */,
  "parent_obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inheritance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_inheritance_parent_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_inheritance_child_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_inheritance" (
  "inheritance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance relationship */,
  "child_cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child class */,
  "parent_cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inheritance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_inheritance_child_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_inheritance_parent_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition relationship */,
  "container_obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the container object */,
  "contained_obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contained object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_composition_container_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_composition_contained_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("contained_obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition relationship */,
  "container_cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the container class */,
  "contained_cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contained class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_composition_contained_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("contained_cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_composition_container_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)
